title: Tick Control in Inwood, Long Island | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Inwood, Long Island starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Inwood's beautiful parks and waterfront properties create the perfect environment for ticks to thrive, putting residents and pets at risk of Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Inwood, from the shoreline homes along Inwood Bay to the residential neighborhoods near Inwood Country Club. Our targeted treatments create a protective barrier around your property, allowing you to enjoy your outdoor spaces safely.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Long Island communities like Inwood with eco-friendly tick control solutions that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand the unique tick challenges in this waterfront area and deliver fast, effective treatments with transparent pricing from $125 to $325.
localContext: Inwood's proximity to Inwood Point Park, Lawrence Beach, and the numerous green spaces along the Five Towns area creates ideal tick habitats in yards, especially near wooded edges and tall grasses. Whether you own a waterfront estate or a family home near Bayview Avenue, our tick control services protect your outdoor living areas year-round.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Inwood?
faqs.answer: Inwood's coastal location and abundant parks create perfect conditions for tick populations to flourish. With proximity to Inwood Point Park and numerous residential green spaces, ticks carrying Lyme disease and other illnesses pose significant health risks to families and pets who spend time outdoors.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Inwood?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Inwood range from $125 to $325, depending on property size and the severity of the infestation. We provide free estimates and customize treatment plans to fit your specific needs and budget.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Inwood, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Inwood typically runs from early spring through late fall, with peak activity from April through September. However, during mild winters, ticks can remain active year-round. We recommend starting preventative treatments in early spring and maintaining regular service throughout the season.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We recommend keeping pets and family members off treated areas until they dry (typically 1-2 hours), after which your yard will be safe to enjoy.
